svg.title: Commit already pushed terminal output
svg.desc: A terminal-style error box refusing to amend a commit that has already been pushed.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

g.text: The latest commit has already been pushed.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

g.text: Amending it would rewrite published history. Make a new commit with fixes instead.
